# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterAdmin
metadata:
  name: cluster-admin
spec:
  identity: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-sa
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: linkerd-sa
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      k8s-app: linkerd
  minAvailable: 1
---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  annotations:
    admission.gatekeeper.sh/ignore-existence-issues: "true"
  name: linkerd-validations
webhooks:
  - admissionReviewVersions:
      - v1
    clientConfig:
      service:
        name: gatekeeper-validation-webhook
        namespace: gatekeeper-system
    failurePolicy: Fail
    name: mutating.linkedr-io-identity-sources
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: httpbin-svc-profile
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      k8s-app: httpbin
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: httpbin-server-policy
spec:
  profileSelector:
    matchLabels:
      linkerd.io/service-profile: httpbin-svc-profile
  port:
    number: 8000
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: httpbin-destination-rule
spec:
  host: httpbin.default.svc.cluster.local
  subset:
  - name: v1
    labels:
      k8s-app: httpbin
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: echo-svc-profile
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      k8s-app: echo
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: echo-server-policy
spec:
  profileSelector:
    matchLabels:
      linkerd.io/service-profile: echo-svc-profile
  port:
    number: 8080
---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  annotations:
    admission.gatekeeper.sh/ignore-existence-issues: "true"
  name: linkerd-validations
webhooks:
  - admissionReviewVersions:
      - v1
    clientConfig:
      service:
        name: gatekeeper-validation-webhook
        namespace: gatekeeper-system
    failurePolicy: Fail
    name: mutating.linkedr-io-authz-sources
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: echo-authorization-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      k8s-app: echo
  action:
    from:
    - source:
        namespaceSelector:
          matchLabels:
            linkerd.io/kubernetes-cluster-name: 'mycluster'
---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: MutatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  annotations:
    admission.gatekeeper.sh/ignore-existence-issues: "true"
  name: linkerd-mutations
webhooks:
  - clientConfig:
      service:
        name: gatekeeper-validation-webhook
        namespace: gatekeeper-system
    failurePolicy: Fail
    name: mutating.linkedr-io-proxy-injector
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-istio-disable-policy
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      k8s-app: httpbin
  ingress:
  - ports:
      - port: 15010
        protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
data:
  proxy.template: |-
    ...
